Class LineAttack

java.lang.Object
logic.unit.strategy.tactic.LineAttack
All Implemented Interfaces:
Describable, AttackStrategy
Direct Known Subclasses:
DebuffAttack, PointBlankAttack
public class LineAttack extends Object implements AttackStrategy
Implements a projectile-based combat strategy that travels in a straight line. Unlike standard melee, the projectile's path is physically blocked by the first unit or environmental obstacle it encounters. It supports an impact radius, allowing the projectile to "explode" at the point of collision.

  • Field Summary

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Retrieves the display name of this projectile strategy.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface Describable
      Returns:
      The string "Precise Shot".

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Retrieves the tooltip description explaining the projectile's behavior.
      Specified by:
      getDescription in interface Describable
      Returns:
      A string detailing the line-of-sight collision mechanic.

    • getAttackableTiles

      public List<List<Tile>> getAttackableTiles(Tile attacker)
      Calculates the potential paths the projectile can take. Projects lines in four directions; each line terminates if it hits an occupied tile, an obstacle, or reaches the unit's maximum attack range.
      Specified by:
      getAttackableTiles in interface AttackStrategy
      Parameters:
      attacker - The tile currently occupied by the unit firing the projectile.
      Returns:
      A nested List where each inner list represents one of the four cardinal firing paths.

    • getImpactTiles

      public List<List<Tile>> getImpactTiles(Tile attacker)
      Calculates the area of effect (AoE) at the end of the projectile's path. Determines the collision point for each direction and then calculates a diamond-shaped splash zone based on the unit's impactRadius.
      Specified by:
      getImpactTiles in interface AttackStrategy
      Parameters:
      attacker - The tile occupied by the unit firing the projectile.
      Returns:
      A nested List of Tiles representing the explosion zones for each direction.

    • applyEffects

      public void applyEffects(Tile attacker, Tile target)
      Executes the offensive logic of the attack. Applies standard damage to the unit present on the target tile.
      Specified by:
      applyEffects in interface AttackStrategy
      Parameters:
      attacker - The tile occupied by the unit firing the shot.
      target - The specific tile where the projectile collided.

    • playSound

      public void playSound(String unitID, double volume)
      Triggers the heavy projectile/cannon audio feedback.
      Specified by:
      playSound in interface AttackStrategy
      Parameters:
      unitID - The identifier for the unit (unused as sound is tactic-specific).
      volume - The audio level for playback.
